creator: CoreDumped@lab321.ru
text:
When enabled koi8-r locale, sort command sorts incorrectly.

Fix: 

I am just compiled sort command from -current. :)
How-To-Repeat: 
Try this script:
uname -a
LANG=ru_SU.KOI8-R
echo LANG:$LANG
sort -k 3,3 -k 5,5  <<END
